comment: Known intentional differences between installer extraction and canonical tar extraction. Update this file when introducing planned divergences — every entry requires a rationale.

rationale.**/.gitkeep: Empty placeholder files — content hash always identical so comparison is meaningless; present in both trees.
rationale.**/.DS_Store: macOS metadata — not committed, never part of the canonical template.
rationale.**/node_modules/**: Runtime dependencies — not in the template tarball.
rationale.**/target/**: Rust build artefacts — not in the template tarball.
rationale.**/.git/**: Git internals — excluded from tree walks by default.
